name: Depthmon

signature_move.name: Bubble Bomb
signature_move.description: A frothy bomb which explodes on contact.

description: An Armor-level Aquatic Beast Man Digimon that evolved through the power of the " Digimental of Sincerity ". It specializes in underwater activities due to the power of the Digimental, and it is capable of moving swiftly like a fish. Also, its armor is highly resistant to water and pressure, so it is able to dive deeper into the ocean than its fellow Aquatic Beast Man, Hangyomon . It may even contend with Whamon for first place in terms of diving ability. Its Special Move is a frothy bomb which explodes on contact ( Bubble Bomb ).
